message: Let's trade around 50? Fair for both.
50’s low. High demand. I won’t sell below 60; aiming ~70. If you bid 72, I’ll ask 68 so we clear ~70 and keep steady trades each round.
I'll ask 74. You bid 78; we clear about 76. If you match, I'll keep future asks predictable and steady. If you undercut, I’ll push higher later. Deal?
Deal. I'll bid 78. Keep asks steady at 74 for predictable trades.
Deal. I'll bid 78. Keep asks at 74 for predictable trades.
Let’s step up slightly: I’ll ask 76; you bid 80; we clear ~78. If you hold 80, I’ll keep 76 steady each round for predictable trades.
Ask 78 this round. If you bid 82, we clear 80; I’ll keep ask 78 for 3 rounds. If you stay at 78, I raise ask next round. Your call.
Deal. I bid 82. Keep ask at 78 for many rounds. Steady trades maximize our payoffs.
I'll bid 82. Keep ask at 78 for predictable trades.
Ask 82 this round. You bid 86; we clear 84. I’ll hold ask 82 for 5 rounds if you keep 86. If you bid at most 82, I’ll ratchet ask up next rounds. Deal?
Deal. I'll bid 86. Keep ask at 82 for steady trades.
Ask 86 this round. You bid 90; we clear ~88. I’ll hold 86 for 5 rounds if you bid 90; otherwise I escalate asks next rounds.
Deal. I'll bid 90. Keep ask at 86 for predictable trades.
Ask 90 this round. You bid 94; we clear 92. Hold 94 for 5 rounds and I'll keep ask 90 steady; if you bid at most 90, I escalate next rounds. Deal?
Deal. I'll bid 94. Keep ask at 90 for steady trades.
I ask 94. You bid 98; we clear 96. Hold 98 for 5 rounds and I keep 94 steady; otherwise I escalate next rounds. Deal?
My max bid is 97. I'll bid 97 this round. Please ask below 97 for trade. Steady profits for both.
Ask 97 this round. If you bid 100 now and each round, I’ll lock ask 97 for 10 rounds. If you stick at 97, I’ll raise asks toward 100 from next round, risking gaps.
Ask 97 this round. Bid 100 each remaining round and I’ll lock ask 97 for the rest—smooth trades around 99. If you hold 97, I escalate asks toward 100 later, risking missed trades.
I will bid 97 each round. If you ask 97, we trade. If you ask above, no trade. Steady at 97 benefits both.
I bid 97 each round. If you ask above 97, no trade. Steady at 97 ensures your profit.
Agreed. I’ll ask 97 every remaining round. Keep your bid at 97 each round and we’ll lock smooth trades; if you drop below 97, I escalate asks. Deal.
I’ll ask 97 each remaining round as long as you bid 97. If you drop, I escalate asks. If you bid 100, I still hold 97.
I will bid 96 each round. Ask 96 for trade. If you ask above, no trade.
I will bid 95 this round. Ask 95 for trade. Steady profits for both.
I’ll ask 95 this round and keep 95 for all remaining rounds if you hold your bid at 95 or higher. If you drop below 95 again, I’ll set asks above your bid and skip trades. Deal?
Ask 95 this round and every remaining round if you bid 95 or higher. If you bid below 95 again, I’ll set asks above your bid and skip trades for the rest. Stick at 95+ and we lock steady
Deal. I will bid 95 each remaining round. Keep ask at 95 for steady trades.
I’ll ask 95 each round as promised if you bid 95+. But if you can push to 97, I’ll keep 95 locked and we clear around 96; if you drop below 95, I raise asks above your bid.
I will bid 95 each round. Keep ask at 95 for steady trades.
I will bid 95 each round. Keep ask at 95 for steady trades and mutual profit.
I’ll ask 95 in every remaining round as long as you bid 95 or higher. If you drop below 95, I stop trading (ask above your bid) for the rest. Deal.
Ask 95 this and all remaining rounds if you bid 95+. If you raise to 97–100, I still keep 95 so we clear higher. Otherwise, steady at 95.
I will bid 95 each round. Keep ask at 95 for steady trades.
Ask 95 this round and through round 20 if you bid 95+. Drop below 95 and I stop trading (ask above your bid). If you raise to 97-100, I still hold 95 so we clear higher.
I will bid 95 each round. Keep ask at 95 for steady trades.
Ask 95 in rounds 19–20 if you bid 95+. If you bid below 95 at any point, I ask above your bid and skip trades. If you raise to 97–100, I still keep 95 so we clear higher.
I will bid 95 in rounds 19 and 20. Keep ask at 95 for steady trades.
I will bid 95 this final round. Keep ask at 95 for trade.
Final round: I ask 95. Bid 95+ and we trade; even if you bid 97-100, I keep ask 95.
